permits.description: New Service 200 amp, Kitchen , Basement office and mechanical room

permits.score_reasons: keyword: rebuild; minor: shed; permit completed; all permits completed

llm_assessment.reasoning: The property has undergone simultaneous full-scale kitchen and multi-bathroom renovations alongside significant whole-house basement expansion, meeting the critical indicators for high-end preparation for sale on a long-term owned property.
